---
title: "Environmental Storytelling & Setting as Character"
aliases: []
family: "Story, Character & Voice"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

<!-- BACKLINKS:START (generated by scripts/backlinks.py — do not edit by hand) -->

## Referenced by

- [Spectator-Friendly Design](../players-social-dynamics/spectator-friendly-design.qmd)

<!-- BACKLINKS:END -->
